name: Tob Tobi Tob Tob Tobi Tob
short_name: Top Toby Top Top Toby Top
lore:
Lore of Tob Tobi Tob Tob Tobi Tob
                                    


It is a character that combines camels, cactuses and beards.
There is a toilet next to it, and the top toe top toe Toby saw was found in the desert.
Previously, it was known as the Top Toby Top.
